page.content: The table presents data on toxin content across various tissues, differentiated by sex. For the ovary (F), the toxin content ranges are as follows: TTX 129–263 nmol/g, 4-epiTTX 10–26 nmol/g, 4,9-anhydro TTX 30–83 nmol/g, 5-deoxy TTX 4–22 nmol/g, 11-deoxy TTX 8–39 nmol/g, 6,11-dideoxy TTX 77–310 nmol/g, and 5,6,11-trideoxy TTX 289–603 nmol/g. In the testicle (M), the values are TTX 1–11 nmol/g, 4-epiTTX <0.5–1 nmol/g, 4,9-anhydro TTX <0.5–3 nmol/g, 5-deoxy TTX <0.5 nmol/g, 11-deoxy TTX <0.5 nmol/g, 6,11-dideoxy TTX <0.5–9 nmol/g, and 5,6,11-trideoxy TTX 1–13 nmol/g. The liver (F) shows TTX 4–24 nmol/g, 4-epiTTX <0.5–6 nmol/g, 4,9-anhydro TTX 5–39 nmol/g, 5-deoxy TTX <0.5–3 nmol/g, 11-deoxy TTX <0.5–1 nmol/g, 6,11-dideoxy TTX 1–24 nmol/g, and 5,6,11-trideoxy TTX 3–16 nmol/g. An unspecified tissue (M) has TTX 9–31 nmol/g, 4-epiTTX 1–3 nmol/g, 4,9-anhydro TTX 9–15 nmol/g, 5-deoxy TTX <0.5–2 nmol/g, 11-deoxy TTX <0.5–1 nmol/g, 6,11-dideoxy TTX <0.5–59 nmol/g, and 5,6,11-trideoxy TTX 10–18 nmol/g. The skin (F) has TTX 78–93 nmol/g, 4-epiTTX 8–10 nmol/g, 4,9-anhydro TTX 21–30 nmol/g, 5-deoxy TTX 3–10 nmol/g, 11-deoxy TTX 3–8 nmol/g, 6,11-dideoxy TTX 6–13 nmol/g, and 5,6,11-trideoxy TTX 110–155 nmol/g. Another unspecified tissue (M) shows TTX 38–197 nmol/g, 4-epiTTX 2–9 nmol/g, 4,9-anhydro TTX 6–26 nmol/g, 5-deoxy TTX 1–7 nmol/g, 11-deoxy TTX 1–9 nmol/g, 6,11-dideoxy TTX 2–28 nmol/g, and 5,6,11-trideoxy TTX 39–153 nmol/g.

page.content: The muscle (F) displays TTX 3–8 nmol/g, 4-epiTTX <0.5–1 nmol/g, 4,9-anhydro TTX <0.5–1 nmol/g, 5-deoxy TTX <0.5 nmol/g, 11-deoxy TTX <0.5 nmol/g, 6,11-dideoxy TTX 1–6 nmol/g, and 5,6,11-trideoxy TTX 5–7 nmol/g. An unspecified muscle tissue (M) has TTX 8–16 nmol/g, 4-epiTTX 1–3 nmol/g, 4,9-anhydro TTX <0.5–1 nmol/g, 5-deoxy TTX <0.5 nmol/g, 11-deoxy TTX <0.5 nmol/g, 6,11-dideoxy TTX <0.5–5 nmol/g, and 5,6,11-trideoxy TTX <0.5–14 nmol/g. The intestine (F) shows TTX 8–67 nmol/g, 4-epiTTX 1–16 nmol/g, 4,9-anhydro TTX 7–110 nmol/g, 5-deoxy TTX 1–4 nmol/g, 11-deoxy TTX <0.5–12 nmol/g, 6,11-dideoxy TTX 11–145 nmol/g, and 5,6,11-trideoxy TTX 25–71 nmol/g. Lastly, another unspecified intestine tissue (M) has TTX 3–7 nmol/g, 4-epiTTX <0.5–1 nmol/g, 4,9-anhydro TTX 2–6 nmol/g, 5-deoxy TTX <0.5 nmol/g, 11-deoxy TTX <0.5 nmol/g, 6,11-dideoxy TTX 2–28 nmol/g, and 5,6,11-trideoxy TTX 5–7 nmol/g.
